name: Vercel

composio_registry_match.name: Vercel
composio_registry_match.description: Vercel is a platform for frontend frameworks and static sites, enabling developers to host websites and web services that deploy instantly, scale automatically, and require minimal configuration.

description: A cloud platform for static sites and Serverless Functions that provides a REST API to manage deployments, domains, projects, and infrastructure.
notes: Vercel has an extensive public REST API and existing community-maintained MCP servers available for integration. [human-verified: Bearer token confirmed. Free hobby tier. Token in Account Settings > Tokens instantly.]
